findings.description: The NC Water Resources Environmental Quality logo appears slightly different in color rendering between PDF and HTML, but is present and correctly placed in both.
findings.evidence: PDF shows logo with specific color gradients; HTML shows same logo with minor color variation. Logo is present and in correct location.

findings.description: The header layout in the PDF has the logo on the left with official names (Pat McCrory, Donald R. Van Der Vaart, S. Jay Zimmerman) right-aligned, creating a two-column header. The HTML stacks everything in a single column on the left.
findings.evidence: PDF: Logo left, names right-aligned. HTML: Logo top, names stacked below in left-aligned single column.

findings.description: The Director name shows 'S. JAY ZIMMERMAN' in the PDF but 'A. JAY ZIMMERMAN' in the HTML, which appears to be a text content discrepancy.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1: 'S. JAY ZIMMERMAN'; HTML page 1: 'A. JAY ZIMMERMAN'

findings.description: The footer content (State of North Carolina | Environmental Quality | Water Resources, address, phone) from the PDF page 1 appears between page-equivalent sections in the HTML rather than being removed.
findings.evidence: PDF: footer at bottom of page 1. HTML: footer content appears inline between the outline section and the History/Background section.

findings.description: S. Jay Zimmerman's name is rendered as an ordered list item due to the 'S.' being misinterpreted as a list marker
findings.evidence:
PDF shows 'S. JAY ZIMMERMAN / Director' as plain text. HTML renders it as '
  1. JAY ZIMMERMAN
    Director
', converting the 'S.' into a list marker and losing the 'S.' initial.

findings.description: The 'S.' initial of S. Jay Zimmerman's name is lost due to misinterpretation as a list marker
findings.evidence: PDF: 'S. JAY ZIMMERMAN'. HTML: rendered as list item 'JAY ZIMMERMAN' with 'S.' consumed as the list marker, changing the name.

findings.description: Page footer content from page 1 is included as body text between the outline and Section I
findings.evidence: HTML includes 'State of North Carolina | Environmental Quality | Water Resources / 1611 Mail service Center | Raleigh, North Carolina 27699-1611 / 919 707 9000' as a paragraph in the middle of the document flow, along with the footer bar image. This is page footer content that appears as inline content.
